text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: trasz

Log:
  Make the linux rc script use linrdlnk by default.

  This fixes Linux gettyname(3), with caveats (see PR).

  PR:		kern/240767
  MFC after:	2 weeks
  Sponsored by:	The FreeBSD Foundation
